content:
Query: Write file './output/boids-simulation/src/utils.js' with the provided CONTEXT text. Use write_file(path, CONTEXT.read()).

Relevant data is available as the `CONTEXT` REPL variable — use `CONTEXT.read/lines/grep` to navigate it.

Respond with exactly one ```repl``` code block.

reply:
```repl
content = CONTEXT.read()
write_file('./output/boids-simulation/src/utils.js', content)
# sanity-check
assert read_file('./output/boids-simulation/src/utils.js') == content
done("Wrote ./output/boids-simulation/src/utils.js")
```
